name: stencil
description: CLI to build Stencil projects and generate components

options.name: --help
options.description: Display the help output explaining the different flags

subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: Build components for development or production

options.name: --ci
options.description: Run a build using recommended settings for a Continuous Integration (CI) environment

options.name: --debug
options.description: Set the log level to debug

options.name: --max-workers
options.description: Max number of workers the compiler should use

options.name: --next
options.description: Opt-in to test the 'next' Stencil compiler features

options.name: --no-open
options.description: Do not automatically open the browser window

name: --port
--p
options.description: Port for the Integrated Dev Server

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Logs additional information about each step of the build

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Skips build process before running the tests

args.name: name
args.description: Name of new component (must contain dash (-))

subcommands.name: telemetry
subcommands.description: Opt in or out of telemetry
